improvement_prs.note: refactor(types): add RepoSearchResult type, fix unknown[] on searchRepos/getRecentRepos, add 7 tests. Created 2026-04-25.

merged_prs.title: fix(ui): workflow toggle error feedback + RepoIssue comments type fix
fix(write-ops): fix addComment body quoting and closePR write-mode bypass
feat(run-actions): add cancelRun and rerunFailedJobs capabilities
feat(labels): add label management to issue and PR detail views
test(config): align vitest aliases and include patterns with tsconfig
test(sanitize): add tests for sanitizeHtml security utility
refactor(gh-bridge): use PRBranchStatus type for getPRBranchStatus return
test(gh-bridge): add tests for enableWorkflow, disableWorkflow, getFileContent, getWorkflows
refactor(gh-bridge): use shared types for return types of data-fetching methods
ci: add npm test step to CI workflow
test(gh-bridge): add tests for requestReview method
test(gh-bridge): add tests for getIssueDetail, getPRDetail, getPRChecks, getPRDiff, getRepoPermission, mergePR

open_issues.title: ci: upgrade Node.js from 20 to 22 (blocked - workflow permissions)
open_issues.note: Issue #53 contains manual instructions for Node22 upgrade. Cannot be automated due to workflow file restrictions.

notes: PR (repo-assist/improve-repo-search-types) created 2026-04-25: adds RepoSearchResult type, fixes unknown[] return types on searchRepos/getRecentRepos, adds 7 tests. Issue #55 is a fallback issue (not PR) for deps update. Major updates available: marked 17→18, vite 7→8 (deferred - major bumps need assessment). Continue adding tests for remaining untested GhBridge methods.
